title: The Lake That Fell From Space
description: Lonar Lake — a meteorite impact crater in Maharashtra, one of Earth's rarest geological wonders

scenes.title: The Hidden Wonder
scenes.narration: महाराष्ट्र में एक ऐसी झील है जो किसी नदी, ज्वालामुखी या मानवीय हाथों से नहीं बनी। यह हजारों साल पहले पृथ्वी से टकराए एक विशाल उल्का से जन्मी है।

shots.subject: Lonar Lake
shots.action: morning mist slowly reveals the perfectly circular crater lake surrounded by dense green forest
shots.environment: massive basalt plateau in Maharashtra with untouched wilderness
shots.negative_prompt: No people, no buildings, no text, no watermark, no CGI artifacts, no blur
shots.search_prompt: Ultra realistic aerial drone shot of Lonar Lake in Maharashtra, morning mist over perfectly circular meteorite crater lake surrounded by dense green forest on basalt plateau, cinematic slow push-in, BBC Earth documentary style, golden sunrise, deep focus, warm natural colors, no people, 8K ultra detailed

scenes.title: The Cosmic Impact
scenes.narration: लगभग पचास हज़ार साल पहले, एक विशाल उल्का अविश्वसनीय गति से पृथ्वी के वायुमंडल से गुज़री और इस प्राचीन भूमि से जा टकराई।

shots.subject: gigantic meteor
shots.action: meteor tearing across prehistoric sky striking Earth with enormous force
shots.environment: ancient Maharashtra landscape before human civilization
shots.negative_prompt: No science fiction spaceship, no fantasy elements, no cartoon style, no text
shots.search_prompt: Cinematic photorealistic recreation of a giant meteor racing across prehistoric sky and striking ancient Maharashtra landscape, fiery orange trail against deep blue sunset sky, anamorphic wide angle, Hollywood quality scientific visualization, no CGI artifacts

scenes.title: Birth of the Crater
scenes.narration: इस टक्कर ने लगभग दो किलोमीटर चौड़ा एक विशाल गड्ढा बना दिया, जिसने परिदृश्य को हमेशा के लिए बदल दिया।

shots.subject: newly formed impact crater
shots.action: dust clouds rising while molten rocks scatter outward creating the massive circular crater
shots.environment: ancient basalt plateau after meteor impact
shots.focus_subject: massive impact crater with dust and molten rock
shots.negative_prompt: No fantasy explosions, no unrealistic fireballs, no text
shots.search_prompt: Ultra realistic geological aerial view of massive meteor impact crater forming on ancient basalt plateau, glowing orange dust and molten rock scattering outward, dark basalt landscape, slow cinematic pull-back, dramatic atmospheric lighting, National Geographic documentary style

scenes.title: A Martian Window
scenes.narration: आज दुनिया भर से वैज्ञानिक लोनार झील आते हैं क्योंकि इसकी अनोखी भूविज्ञान मंगल ग्रह पर पाए जाने वाले प्रभाव क्रेटरों से काफी मिलती-जुलती है।

shots.subject: scientists studying Lonar Lake
shots.action: researchers examining rock samples and photographing the crater collecting geological data
shots.environment: peaceful lakeside surrounded by lush forest
shots.negative_prompt: No laboratory, no city, no crowds, no text
shots.search_prompt: National Geographic documentary shot of scientists studying rock samples beside Lonar Lake in Maharashtra, researchers examining volcanic basalt in peaceful forest setting, soft afternoon sunlight, earthy natural tones, smooth steadicam, eye level, no people close-ups, documentary style

scenes.title: A Gift From Space
scenes.narration: लोनार झील एक खूबसूरत जगह से कहीं अधिक है। यह एक याद दिलाती है कि महाराष्ट्र के सबसे बड़े प्राकृतिक अजूबों में से एक अंतरिक्ष से आया है।

shots.subject: Lonar Lake aerial panorama
shots.action: camera slowly ascends revealing the entire perfectly circular crater surrounded by endless green forest as birds glide across the sky
shots.focus_subject: complete circular crater lake surrounded by forest
shots.negative_prompt: No people, no buildings, no text, no watermark
